summary: The user sought advice on maximizing their 30-minute morning commute through engaging audiobooks and podcasts. They expressed interest in self-help and personal development content and requested recommendations for apps and tools to enhance productivity and time management.
facts: The user has a daily commute to work that takes about 30 minutes. The user is particularly interested in self-help and personal development books to improve productivity and time management skills. The user plans to try a mix of audiobooks and podcasts to see what they enjoy most. The user is not a morning person and is looking for tips to stay focused and alert during their morning commute. The user is considering using playback speed and sleep timer features in their listening apps. The user is exploring various podcast and audiobook recommendations, including "The Daily," "How I Built This," and "The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People." The user is interested in task management and organization apps like Todoist, Trello, and Evernote. The user is also looking for time management tools such as RescueTime and Focus@Will.
